Subject: Integrated Annual Report for the financial year 2024-25 and Notice of the 43rd Annual
         General Meeting

Dear Sir/Madam,

Pursuant to Regulations 30 and 34 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements)
Regulations, 2015, please find attached Integrated Annual Report of Eicher Motors Limited (“the
Company”) including the Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report for the financial year
2024-25 along with Notice of the 43rd Annual General Meeting of the Company scheduled to be held
on Thursday, August 21, 2025 at 1.00 p.m. Indian Standard Time, through Video Conferencing (VC)/
Other Audio Visual Means (OAVM). The Notice of Annual General Meeting forms part of the
Integrated Annual Report of the Company for the financial year ended on March 31, 2025 and the
same is being sent to the shareholders through electronic mode on their registered e-mail ids and is
also available on the website of the Company at www.eichermotors.com.

Further, pursuant to Regulation 36(1)(b) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements)
Regulations, 2015, a letter containing the web-link including the exact path of the website of the
Company where the Notice of the 43rd Annual General Meeting and the Annual Report can be
accessed is being sent to the shareholders whose email id are not registered with the
Company/RTA/Depository participant(s).

This is for your information and records.

Thanking you,
For Eicher Motors Limited

EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




ABOUT
THE
REPORT
FY 2024-25 marks
Eicher Motors Limited’s
(EML) fourth year of
integrated reporting, in
line with the principles
of the International
Integrated Reporting
<IR> Framework
developed by the
International Integrated
Reporting Council
(IIRC), which is now a
part of the International
Financial Reporting
Standards.

Through this reporting
approach, we aim to provide
a comprehensive view of our
value creation journey, strategic
direction, and key outcomes to
our stakeholders. The Report is
structured around the six capitals
– Financial, Manufactured,
Human, Intellectual, Natural,
and Social & Relationship – while
also accounting for externalities,
material topics, and risks in
our business environment.
This reinforces our continued
commitment to sustainable
development, with our business
objectives and strategies aligned
to the United Nations Sustainable
Development Goals (SDGs).

FUELLED
BY LEGACY
WIRED
FOR GROWTH
For 125 years, Eicher Motors
Limited (EML) has shaped the way
people ride, move and connect –
with motorcycles and commercial
vehicles that have stood the test of
time. FY 2024-25 was a landmark
year, as we drew strength from our
storied legacy while forging bold
new pathways for the future.




04    INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
With six new motorcycle launches,
our foray into electric mobility,
and our highest-ever financial
performance, this was a year of
milestones. From breaking the
1 Million mark in sales to redefining
what modern motorcycling can
mean, we expanded horizons while
staying rooted in authenticity.

As we enter a new era – powered
by smart technology, global
momentum and a thriving rider
community – we remain committed
to delivering soulful experiences,
driving innovation and shaping the
mobility landscape with purpose.

This is not just growth. It’s growth
anchored in legacy, accelerated
by vision, and designed for what
lies ahead.

EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




About EML

DRIVEN BY LEGACY,
POWERED BY VISION
Eicher Motors Limited (EML) is a global automobile company
headquartered in Chennai, India, and listed on the Bombay Stock
Exchange and National Stock Exchange. EML owns Royal Enfield,
the world’s oldest motorcycle brand in continuous production, and
co-owner of VE Commercial Vehicles (VECV),
a pioneer in commercial vehicle transformation.



E 1,46,615 Crores
Market cap of EML as of March 31, 2025
  33% YoY

EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




        PURE
        MOTORCYCLING
        WITH ROYAL
        ENFIELD
                 We keep riding pure. We just love the feeling of
                 riding out on an Enfield, plain and simple, and
                 our purpose is to preserve that feeling. While the
                 world moves fast, we go at our own pace, living
                 the moment, riding further, going deeper. We’re
                 the guardians of what’s authentic and real for
                 people who are trying to explore and discover
                 themselves. We have covered a lot of ground
                 over the last 124 years, and we’ll keep riding for a
                 while yet. Filling a rider’s life with real, authentic
                 experiences is what we call Pure Motorcycling.

                 PURE
                 A fundamental experience of life, authentic and real.
                 Connecting at a sensorial level with your innermost self and
                 your surroundings. Not being dependent on approval or
                 endorsement from others. Steering clear of the artificial, the
                 superficial, the superfluous and the contrived.


                 MOTORCYCLING
                 Motorcycling includes riding, owning, maintaining, caring and
                 workmanship as an active pursuit. Focussing on the essentials
                 and not the excess. Not transforming, but reconnecting with
                 the purity of the experience.

Business Segments

PURPOSE-LED GROWTH
IN MOTORCYCLING AND
COMMERCIAL MOBILITY

Eicher Motors Limited (EML) operates with a purpose – to create enduring
value through engineering excellence, soulful experiences, and future-ready
mobility solutions. With two powerful business verticals – Royal Enfield
and VE Commercial Vehicles – EML drives both lifestyle and livelihood with
sustainability and innovation at its core.

VECV PERFORMANCE
In the Financial Year 2024-25, VECV continued its growth trajectory, ending the year
as market share leader in LMD Trucks and posting market share gains across business
segments. This performance reflects the VECV's unwavering focus on Customer
Centricity, Technology Advancement, and Operational Excellence, driven by the
transformational initiatives launched in the previous year.
With a strong execution framework and collaborative effort across the organization, VECV achieved several significant
milestones:

OUR BUSINESSES, MARKET
AND FUTURE PROSPECTS
(i) Eicher Trucks and Buses (ETB)
Eicher Trucks and Buses delivered
its highest-ever sales performance
in the Financial Year 2024-25, with
87,724 units sold, registering a growth
of 5.6% over the previous year. This
performance was driven by strong
volume momentum across LMD, HD,
and Bus segments. VECV achieved
leadership in the LMD segment and
crossed 20,000 sales mark in Bus
segment.

The industrial system delivered record
production of 88,764 vehicles, with
notable improvements in quality
metrics. Enhanced automation,              (ii) Volvo Trucks India (VTI)                under various public and institutional

VE Powertrain (VEPT)
VEPT achieved its highest-ever annual
sales with 60,155 engines delivered in
the Financial Year 2024-25, surpassing
the previous year’s record of 58,962
units. With this, VEPT crossed a
significant milestone of over 400,000

global markets.

VECV SOUTH AFRICA

COMPANY
During the financial year 2024-25, the
South African market has been flat,
particularly in the light and medium-
duty truck segments. VECV South Africa
reported sales of 200 units, marginally
lesser than 226 units last year. There
has been addition of 3 new dealers in
the dealer network as VECV
SA continues to increase its footprint.
Aftersales business continues to
grow, supported by an expanding
service network and a responsive
parts distribution system. While South
Africa’s macroeconomic conditions
faced challenges, the upcoming fleet
replacement demand, construction
projects, and the introduction of
new variants are expected to create
opportunities for Eicher Trucks and

EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




Message from Executive Chairman

ROOTED IN HERITAGE.
DRIVEN BY INNOVATION.
     After more than 25 years at Eicher Motors Limited (EML) in various
     capacities, including as the Managing Director and CEO, I have
     now stepped into a new role. I am delighted to take over as the
     Executive Chairman of EML, and am working closely with the board,
     the team, our partners and extended stakeholders to chart out our
     course over the next few decades.

     On behalf of everyone at Eicher, I would like to extend our deepest
     gratitude to Mr. Sandilya for his outstanding guidance and
     leadership for over 50 years. From his early roles in the company
     to serving as Managing Director, Group CEO, and ultimately as            At EML, we have two solid
     Chairman for 25 years, he has been instrumental in shaping Eicher        businesses – Royal Enfield (RE)
     Motors into what it is today.                                            and VE Commercial Vehicles
                                                                              Ltd (VECV) – which have both
     At EML, we have two solid businesses – Royal Enfield (RE) and VE         consistently grown and delivered
     Commercial Vehicles Ltd (VECV) – which have both consistently            strong performances. Each
     grown and delivered strong performances. Each with its unique            with its unique strengths and
     strengths and identity, what we’ve built reflects strong brands,         identity, what we’ve built reflects
     robust balance sheets, operational discipline and enduring global        strong brands, robust balance
     appeal, making them well-positioned for the future.                      sheets, operational discipline
                                                                              and enduring global appeal,
     As we look ahead, my first focus has been on strengthening               making them well-positioned for
     governance at EML. We have kick-started that process by                  the future.
     inducting new board members, enhancing roles and reconstituting
     committees at the board level. Vinod Aggarwal has been appointed         Siddhartha Lal
     as Vice Chairman (Non-Executive) of EML, while continuing to             Executive Chairman,
     lead VECV as the Managing Director and CEO. He will work with            Eicher Motors Limited
     me in ensuring the highest level of corporate governance at EML.
     B. Govindarajan now takes on his enhanced role as Managing
     Director of EML, while continuing his role as the CEO of Royal
     Enfield. This is a reflection of our deep confidence in his leadership
     and ability to drive the company into its next phase of growth.
     We are also pleased to welcome Ira Gupta and Arun Vasu as
     Independent Directors on the board of Eicher Motors Limited, each
     bringing a wealth of expertise and a fresh perspective.

     With these changes, we have reconstituted all our Board
     committees and appointed an ESG council reporting to the Risk
     Committee. The ESG council, along with the CSR committee, will
     spearhead the thinking on all sustainability and social impact
     for EML, bringing board-level guidance and strategic alignment
     in these critical areas. Together, these transitions represent a
     thoughtful evolution in our leadership and governance designed
     to build a future-ready organisation that is balanced, resilient, and
     deeply committed to charting out our unique journey and creating
     long-term value.

     In this new role, my second area of focus is considering the long-
     term future and potential of our two businesses. We believe that
     both VECV and RE have significant growth potential in India and

EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




Message to Shareholders – Managing Director & CEO

RIDING AHEAD WITH
PURPOSE AND PASSION
     FY 2024-25 was a defining chapter in Royal Enfield's journey, not just
     because of the milestones we reached, but because of how we reached them.
     Through a year that tested our resilience, we held steady to our values, our
     community, our long-term vision and our commitment. And it paid off. It was
     also our strongest financial year to date, with highest-ever revenue, profit
     after tax, and EBITDA. For the first time in our 125-year history, we became
     a million strong. Not only did we close the year with our highest-ever annual
     sales, over 10.02 Lakhs motorcycles, we also grew 10% over the previous
     year. Domestic sales grew more than 8% to 9,02,757 units, while international
     volumes grew nearly 30%.


     The festive season brought another proud milestone, for the
     first time ever, we crossed 1,00,000 motorcycles in a single
     month. Models like the new Classic 350 and the Bullet Battalion
     Black struck a powerful chord with riders and contributed              The festive season brought
     significantly to this momentum. It wasn’t a single bold move           another proud milestone, for

     through decisions, years of planning and steady effort, and an         1,00,000 motorcycles in a

     pride but more than that, it’s a celebration of the community          the new Classic 350 and the
     that brought us here; our riders, our partners, our teams.             Bullet Battalion Black struck a

     We launched six motorcycles this year, each a bold expression          contributed significantly to this
     of our design philosophy and riding ethos. The Bear 650 led            momentum.
     the way, redefining modern retro adventure riding with a bold
     new interpretation of our twin-cylinder DNA. The Guerrilla 450,
     on our award-winning liquid-cooled Sherpa engine, brought
                                                                            B Govindarajan
                                                                            Managing Director - Eicher Motors Limited &

     to our portfolio was the Scram 440, a motorcycle that blends
     urban scrambler aesthetics with dynamic rideability, perfect for
     the city and beyond.

     This was also the Year of the Classic, a tribute to timeless design,
     enduring craftsmanship, and our most iconic motorcycle line.
     We introduced three new motorcycles that celebrated the
     spirit of the Classic in distinct ways. The Classic 350, already
     a mainstay in our lineup, continued its legacy with refreshed
     colourways and detailing that gave riders more ways to express
     their personality while staying true to its classic silhouette. The
     Classic 650 marked a significant evolution, combining the
     enduring appeal of the Classic design with modern engineering
     and our refined twin-cylinder platform. It’s a motorcycle

                 Limited, marked by record achievements across our flagship

                 sustainable, long-term value creation.

INTO THE LIVING LEGACY OF
THE HIMALAYAS
Royal Enfield and UNESCO came
together to embark on the third edition
of The Great Himalayan Exploration
– a one-of-a-kind motorcycling
expedition dedicated to documenting
the Intangible Cultural Heritage of the
Himalayan region. Over two weeks,
rider-researchers engaged closely
with local communities, capturing
stories and preserving traditions that
were exclusively filmed by National
Geographic India for episodic release.
The expedition underscores Royal
Enfield’s commitment to preserving
living heritage while fostering resilience
and awareness around climate change
in these sacred mountains.

OF THE ICONIC HIMALAYAN
ODYSSEY
Celebrating two decades of grit and
camaraderie, Royal Enfield flagged
off the 20th edition of its most iconic
ride – Himalayan Odyssey 2024.
This milestone edition saw 122 riders
traverse 3,050 km over 18 days to
Umling La and the Siachen Base Camp.
The ride concluded in Leh with the debut
of the Great Himalayan Adventure
Festival.

EXPANDED REOWN TO
236 CITIES ACROSS INDIA,
SIMPLIFYING UPGRADES FOR
ROYAL ENFILED OWNERS
Royal Enfield expanded its pre-owned
motorcycle programme, REOWN, to
236 cities across India. The platform
allows customers to seamlessly trade
in their motorcycles and upgrade
within the Royal Enfield family. REOWN,
a transparent platform for buying
and selling pre-owned Royal Enfield
motorcycles, was first introduced in
2023 in select cities.

GUERRILLA 450
RETURN OF THE REAL
ROADSTER
           Royal Enfield’s all-new
           Guerrilla 450 has stormed
          the roadster segment with
         raw instinct, intuitive
        performance, and a uniquely
        defiant character. Built on
       the award-winning Sherpa
      450 platform, this muscular
     modern roadster delivers an
     unfiltered riding experience,
    whether it's darting through
   city traffic, leaning into
   winding backroads, or
  cruising on open highways.
  With its spirited 40PS power
 output and 40Nm torque, the
 Guerrilla 450 is engineered
for pure, primal fun.
EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




Guerrilla 450

KINETIC, INTUITIVE AND
EAGER TO PLAY
A fierce new addition to Royal Enfield’s roadster lineage, the Guerrilla 450 blends raw
attitude with agile performance. Powered by the all-new 452cc Sherpa engine and
built on a twin-spar tubular frame, it delivers responsive handling and an unfiltered
riding experience, perfect for tight city corners and sweeping open roads alike.

                                            GUERRILLA 450 X EL SOLITARIO
                                            “PROMETEO” DEBUTS AT EICMA 2024
                                            Prometeo – a striking collaboration between the Guerrilla 450 and
                                            acclaimed customiser El Solitario, was brought to life by Studio Waldemeyer
                                            at EICMA. The collaboration draws inspiration from the myth of Prometheus
                                            and stands as a bold symbol of defiance against a world increasingly
                                            dominated by algorithmic control. This powerful custom artwork challenges
                                            the growing conformity threatening the spirit of freedom and individuality
                                            central to motorcycling culture. Prometeo reaffirms Royal Enfield’s
                                            commitment to authentic, rebellious design that honours the beautiful
                                            chaos of personal autonomy and the pure motorcycling way of life.

     GOAN
     CLASSIC 350
     A NEW CLASSIC WITH AN
     OLD SOUL - A TRIBUTE
     TO SEVENTIES GOAN
     MOTO-CULTURE




48     INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
                                       CORPORATE OVERVIEW




                The all-new Goan Classic
                350 is Royal Enfield’s tribute
               to the free-spirited moto-
              culture of 1970s Goa. Inspired
              by bobber-style customs and
             stripped-down silhouettes,
            the motorcycle blends
            heritage aesthetics with
           laid-back riding geometry,
           capturing the easygoing
          rhythm of life on the coast.

           A relaxed posture, floating
           single seat, mid-ape
          handlebars and chopped
         fenders define the Goan
         Classic’s distinctive form,
        while whitewall tyres on
        edge-laced tubeless spoke
       wheels complete the look. At
      its heart is the trusted 349cc
     air-oil cooled engine that
    delivers smooth and effortless
    cruising across varied terrain.
   With signature bobber styling
   and four vibrant colourways,
  the Goan Classic 350 is
 engineered for riders who
 prefer the slow lane, on their
own terms.




                    INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25   49
EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




Goan Classic 350

ECHOES OF GOA.
ESSENCE OF A CLASSIC.
Inspired by the freewheeling counterculture of the ’70s and ’80s, the Goan Classic
350 is Royal Enfield’s bold new celebration of India’s most iconic moto-subculture.
Drawing from the sun-soaked spirit and stripped-down aesthetic of Goa’s custom
scene, the bobber-style motorcycle is a heartfelt tribute to freedom, individuality and
self-expression.

     THE CLASSIC

            The Classic 650 Twin takes
            everything riders love about
           the Classic ethos, the elegant
          lines, the poise, the enduring
          charm, and elevates it with
         a deeper, more responsive
        parallel twin engine. It’s
        Royal Enfield’s design
       legacy, tuned for today’s
      road and rider.

      This isn’t a reimagining.
     It’s a natural evolution.
     Crafted for long, unhurried
    journeys, for moments of
   reflection between the
   bends, and for those who
  believe motorcycles should
 feel as good as they look.
 The Classic 650 Twin carries
heritage in its bones, and
confidence in its rhythm.




               INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25   53
EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




Classic 650 Twin

BUILT TO BE RIDDEN.
DESIGNED TO BE ADMIRED.
The Royal Enfield Classic 650 marked a significant new chapter in the legacy of
the iconic Classic series. A stately and super-sized rendition of its forebears, the
Classic 650 draws on Royal Enfield’s rich design DNA while embracing a commanding
new scale, presence and performance. At its heart lies the globally celebrated
648cc parallel twin engine – refined for smooth, responsive, and relaxed cruising –
delivering unhurried power that complements the Classic’s timeless design philosophy.




54     INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
                                                                                                       CORPORATE OVERVIEW

                                         A GLOBAL DEBUT AT EICMA 2024

                                         Show in Milan, where it stood as a highlight of Royal Enfield’s

                                         original design language, giving the Classic 650 a forward-
                                         leaning stance that suggests motion even at a standstill, while

     BEAR 650
     THE ALL-NEW
     INSTINCTIVE
     SCRAMBLER BORN IN
     THE DUST OF LEGENDS




       “WHEN THE GREEN
       FLAG DROPPED,
       THE BULLSH*T
       STOPPED.”

       – FAST EDDIE, 1960
       BIG BEAR RUN
       CHAMPION




58     INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
                                      CORPORATE OVERVIEW




                The all-new Royal Enfield
                Bear 650 is a bold, instinct-
               led scrambler that echoes
              the grit of a 1960 desert race
              champion and the timeless
             pull of ‘gut feel’. Inspired
             by Eddie Mulder’s iconic
            win at the Big Bear Run, the
            Bear 650 blends authentic
           60s-era scrambler styling
           with modern performance and
          raw determination. Built on
         the award-winning 650 Twin
        platform and engineered to
        dominate both city streets
       and dusty trails, it is the
       quintessential ‘bad-roader’
      for the spirited rider.

       Chunky dual-purpose
      tyres, kicked-up rear loop,
      scrambler seat, and a
     toughened stance – all make
    this machine ready to charge
   ahead. With five vibrant
   colourways including the
  tribute shade Two Four Nine,
 the Bear 650 is not just a
 motorcycle; it’s a legacy with
a throttle.




                   INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25   59
EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




Bear 650

BUILT ON GUT,
DRIVEN BY GUT FEEL
Channelling pure instinct, mechanical character and the gritty DNA of scramblers
from a wilder time – the all-new Bear 650 is built on Royal Enfield’s globally
celebrated 650-Twin platform, and delivers a potent blend of smooth, torquey
performance and unfiltered riding pleasure. With 47 bhp and a robust 56.5 Nm
of torque, it packs a stronger mid-range punch, making it the most versatile and
responsive scrambler in its class.

EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




Flying Flea

INTRODUCING A NEW ERA
OF CITY+ MOBILITY
Flying Flea – the new Royal Enfield endorsed City+ brand – is an expression of Royal
Enfield’s commitment to keep moving forever forward. Rooted in legacy yet brimming
with modern intent, Flying Flea channels the spirit of innovation to bring forth a unique
range of city+ electric motorcycles for riders around the world.

The original Royal Enfield Flying Flea of the 1940s was a landmark in motorcycle design: a lightweight, rugged two-wheeler air-
dropped behind enemy lines to aid Allied forces in France. Later embraced by civilians for its adaptability and nimbleness, the Flea
became a symbol of resilience and possibility. That same bold spirit now fuels the modern-day Flying Flea brand, that reimagines
that same agility, adaptability and purpose for today’s streets.


PRODUCT LINE-UP AND                          standout feature – a reimagined Girder        flex under braking, offering a stable,

Motorcycle Upgrades

ICONIC MOTORCYCLING,
REFRESHED FOR THE
FREE SPIRIT
Royal Enfield has always been at the forefront of motorcycling innovation, blending
timeless design with cutting-edge advancements to deliver an unparalleled riding
experience. This year, several iconic models have undergone transformative upgrades,
amplifying their performance, aesthetics, and functionality to meet the evolving needs
of today’s riders. From bold new editions to adventure-ready enhancements, Royal
Enfield continues to push the boundaries of motorcycling, ensuring every ride is an
adventure in itself.

Beyond Motorcycles

RIDE-READY INNOVATION.
RETAIL-READY EXPERIENCE.
In FY 2024-25, Royal Enfield further expanded its lifestyle ecosystem,
strengthening its presence across riding gear, apparel, and retail formats.
The brand continued to drive innovation in new additions to its roster of
protective gear and everyday apparel, supporting a growing community
of riders and enthusiasts seeking purpose-built products that reflect the
motorcycling way of life.

THE NEW LIFESTYLE
COLLECTION - A COLLECTION
OF EVERYDAY STAPLES
The New Lifestyle Apparel Collection
was designed for the everyday
adventurer – those who see excitement
in the little moments, whether on the
road or in daily life. Rooted in Royal
Enfield’s rich legacy, this collection
blends timeless motorcycling heritage
with modern style, creating pieces that
resonate with both nostalgic souls and
contemporary trendsetters.

 The collection features breathable
cotton jerseys perfect for warm-
weather rides, rugged twills built to
withstand any journey, and lightweight
linens that move effortlessly with you.

EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




        INTO THE
        MOTOVERSE
         A WORLD OF
         WHEELS
         A COMMUNITY
         OF ONE




74     INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
                                                   CORPORATE OVERVIEW




Taking forward Royal Enfield’s pursuit of nurturing a global
motorcycling community, the 14th edition of Motoverse came
alive in Goa, where riders, creators, musicians, artists,
and explorers converged over three immersive days to
celebrate a shared passion for the ride.

This year, the community-first ethos remained at the heart
of every experience, from soul-stirring stories at MotoReel
to collaborative art in the Art of Motorcycling, genre-
bending performances at MotoSonic, and hands-on learning
at MotoVille. Adding to the excitement were exclusive
first-look showcases of the Goan Classic 350, Scram 440, a
dynamic new ADV crossover; and the agile FT450, marking
Royal Enfield’s return to flat-track racing.

More than a festival, Motoverse 2024 continues to stand
as a testament to the evolving spirit of motorcycling, open,
expressive, and built on the bonds forged between those
who ride.




                                INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25   75
EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




Pure Motorcycling Experiences

REVS, RHYTHMS, AND THE OPEN
ROAD FOR THE ENTHUSIASTS
Motoverse 2024, Royal Enfield’s marquee motorcycling festival, culminated in yet
another unforgettable edition, bringing together nearly 10,000 riders and enthusiasts
from India and around the world to the sun-kissed shores of Goa. From adrenaline-
fuelled motorsport to soulful music, insightful talks, and immersive art, Motoverse
once again emerged as a vibrant confluence of community, culture, and the spirit of
Pure Motorcycling.




                                      IMPACT




                                      10,000+
                                      Attendees




                                      12+
                                      Countries showcased
                                      artworks capturing the spirit
                                      of motorcycles, freedom,
                                      and creativity at the Art of
                                      Motorcycling arena




76     INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
                                                                                  CORPORATE OVERVIEW




                                                        Scram 440
                                                        A surprise reveal, the Scram 440 is
                                                        Royal Enfield’s newest ADV crossover
                                                        that blends urban agility with weekend
                                                        trail-readiness. Equipped with switchable
                                                        ABS, long-travel suspension, a 6-speed
                                                        gearbox, LED headlamps, and dual-
                                                        purpose tyres, it’s a purpose-built dual-
                                                        sport motorcycle with contemporary
                                                        capability.

                                                        FT450
                                                        Built on the Guerrilla 450 platform, the
                                                        new FT450 took centre stage at the flat
                                                        track arena. This lightweight flat-tracker
                                                        is designed for agility, performance, and
                                                        fun, marking Royal Enfield’s return to
                                                        focussed flat-track racing machines. A
                                                        successor to the FT411, the FT450 also
                                                        launched the Slide School Cup in India,
                                                        following its successful run in Europe.

                                                        Collaborations and Collections
                                                        Royal Enfield also introduced a boho-
                                                        inspired apparel line in collaboration
                                                        with Rafu'D, reflecting Goa’s laid-back
                                                        aesthetic. Additionally, the brand
                                                        launched Revv’ed Up Runway,
                                                        a vintage-themed fashion show
                                                        highlighting the latest from Royal Enfield
                                                        Apparel.

                                                        Motobrew
                                                        In collaboration with Goa Brewing Co.,
                                                        Royal Enfield debuted its own Motobrew,
                                                        a crisp craft lager brewed exclusively for
                                                        the festival.




SPOTLIGHT LAUNCHES AND REVEALS
At the heart of this year’s Motoverse was a series of
high-impact product unveilings and showcases:

Goan Classic 350
Making its debut was the Goan Classic 350, a
bobber-inspired motorcycle that pays homage to
the free-spirited Goan motorcycling culture of the
1970s and 1980s. With vintage aesthetics, stripped-
back design, and relaxed ergonomics, this model
embodies nostalgia with a modern soul.

EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




PURE MOTORCYCLING ZONES
Music Meets Motorcycling
The MotoSonic stage lit up Goa’s nights, fusing music
and motorcycling into an unforgettable vibe. The lineup
included:
 Rajakumari, Ritviz, Raftaar, and Tech Panda x
  Kenzani, who set the mainstage ablaze.
 On the Spotify RADAR stage, emerging Indian artists
  like Gini and Zephyrtone kept the energy alive with
  fresh, genre-bending performances.




Conversations, Art, and Inspiration
MotoReel hosted real-life stories of courage,
endurance, and purpose:
 Dave & Laura Chamberlain recounted their
  journey across 55+ countries.
 Karthik Tupili, Guinness World Record holder,
  shared insights on long-distance riding in India.
 Major Vivek Jacob and Col Kaushal Kashyap
  shared powerful narratives from their time in the
  Indian Special Forces.
 In the Art of Motorcycling arena, artworks from
  12+ countries explored the relationship between
  motorcycles, freedom, and creativity.

MotoVille: Learning and Lifestyle
Motoverse also became a space for learning and lifestyle
exploration. Workshops led by industry veterans and
moto creators allowed enthusiasts to engage deeply with
motorcycling craft – from customisation techniques to
storytelling on two wheels. Royal Enfield's lifestyle offerings
took centre stage with new apparel collections and
accessories designed for the modern explorer.

EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




        PURE MOTORCYCLING
        EXPERIENCES
         ART OF MOTORCYCLING
         (SEASON 4) - CELEBRATING
         THE SOUL OF MOTORCYCLING
         SUBCULTURES




80     INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
                                                     CORPORATE OVERVIEW




At Royal Enfield, motorcycling is more than a
ride – it’s self-expression. In its fourth season,
this initiative evolved into a global platform,
connecting creative voices from across 12
countries. Themed around the year 3000 A.D.,
Art of Motorcycling (AOM) 2024: Y3K Edition,
gathered 42,000 entries judged by a diverse
jury of 4 global and 19 regional art pioneers.
With a reach of 26.68 Million and 10.4 Million
engagements, it crowned 7 global winners.




                                 INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25   81
EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




Art of Motorcycling (Season 4)

REIMAGINING MOTORCYCLING
IN THE YEAR 3000 AD
The fourth season of Royal Enfield’s Art of Motorcycling took a bold conceptual
leap, inviting creators across the world to visualise the future of freedom on
two wheels. Themed “Y3K”, the season encouraged entries that imagined
a galactic motorcycling culture – set in unexplored terrains, with new
perspectives on technology, identity, and adventure.

The campaign went global, extending to twelve countries including Thailand,
Indonesia, Australia, New Zealand, South Korea, Japan, Malaysia, India, Brazil,
Argentina, Colombia and Mexico – reflecting the brand’s growing international
creative community.




82     INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
                                                                                      CORPORATE OVERVIEW




                                                       FROM CANVAS TO COMMUNITY
                                                       In addition to design entries, the season included:
                                                        Virtual masterclasses with leading artists and
                                                         design institutions
                                                        Graffiti activations in select cities
                                                        Collaborative collections with Daily Objects
                                                         and FARAK, transformed winning Art of
                                                         Motorcycling designs into edgy streetwear and
                                                         stylish accessories – bringing the spirit of Y3K
                                                         into everyday fashion

                                                       Finalists were selected through a combination
                                                       of jury curation and community voting. Seven
                                                       winners earned an all-expenses-paid trip to
                                                       Motoverse 2024, where their works were exhibited
                                                       as exclusive Art of Motorcycling merchandise.
                                                       Select creators were also featured on the
                                                       Motoverse Vox Pops, and the winner of the
                                                       Comic Art category received the opportunity to
                                                       collaborate on a future Royal Enfield project.

                                                       The 2024 edition marked a significant step forward,
                                                       turning Art of Motorcycling from a design contest
                                                       into a global movement, where imagination
                                                       and expression continue to steer the future of
                                                       motorcycling.




FOUR MEDIUMS. ONE MISSION.
The Y3K Edition featured entries across four
categories, each offering a unique lens of
imagination:
Gen AI
Artfully engineered prompts bring imagination alive
Digital Art
Digital tools of today fuel a brand new reality
Handcrafted Design
Celebrating traditional techniques in a futuristic
context
Comic Art
Storytelling through sequential art

To nurture this creativity, the season was supported
by virtual masterclasses, interactive graffiti
installations, collaborations and a powerful jury
panel comprising global and regional names like
Aaquib Wani, Debjyoti Saha, Haruka Santoka, and
Varun Gupta, alongside artistic voices from every
participating country.

        MOTORSPORTS
        AND CUSTOMS
         ROYAL ENFIELD CONTINENTAL
         GT CUP 2024 - THE PUREST
         FORM OF RACING. THE PUREST
         EXPRESSION OF SPEED.




84     INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
                                      CORPORATE OVERVIEW




The Royal Enfield Continental GT Cup 2024,
presented in partnership with JK Tyre
Motorsport, is a celebration of unfiltered,
accessible, and homegrown track racing. Built
around the race-ready Continental GT-R650,
this one-make championship invites both
seasoned professionals and emerging amateurs
to test their skill, precision, and endurance on
India’s most iconic circuits. With a focus on
nurturing talent and deepening motorsport
culture in the country, the GT Cup offers more
than just podium finishes, it creates a thriving
community bound by speed, discipline, and the
shared pursuit of racing in its purest form.

CREATING PATHWAYS,
BUILDING COMMUNITY
Beyond the podium, the Continental
GT Cup represents Royal Enfield’s
broader vision of cultivating a
thriving motorcycling ecosystem
in India. Through initiatives like the
Royal Enfield Track School, the
brand is lowering entry barriers and
offering structured pathways for
aspiring riders to hone their skills,
gain confidence on the track, and
potentially take their first step into
professional racing.
The 2024 edition reinforced that the
Cup is more than a race series, it is a
platform for growth, for learning, and
for fostering a deeper connection
with motorcycling in its purest, most
exhilarating form.

TRACK SCHOOL: BUILDING
SKILL, CONFIDENCE AND
COMMUNITY
Royal Enfield Track School continued
to serve as a powerful entry point into
the world of track riding, equipping
enthusiasts with foundational racing
skills and a clear pathway to the
Continental GT Cup. Designed to be
both inclusive and aspirational, the
academy made racetrack training
more accessible across the country,
empowering over 250 riders across
five cities through a series of sessions
conducted alongside the GT Cup
Selections. In the past six months
alone, four dedicated Track Schools
were held in Coimbatore, training 80

Royal Enfield motorcycles have always
been a perfect canvas for imagination
and self-expression. Rooted in the
brand’s passion for self-expression and
craftsmanship, it celebrates the rider’s
desire to stand out, embrace individuality,
and push creative boundaries. This
culture thrives on collaboration with
visionary builders and designers, creating
motorcycles that are not just vehicles but
rolling works of art, fusing heritage with
innovation and attitude.

Global Collaborations

STYLE, SPEED AND

SHOTGUN 650 X ICON
MOTORSPORTS: LIMITED-
EDITION CUSTOM
COLLABORATION
Royal Enfield launched the limited-
edition Shotgun 650 in partnership
with ICON Motorsports, drawing direct
inspiration from the iconic “Always
Something” custom build. This exclusive
model marked a bold entry into the
global custom culture, limited to only
100 units worldwide. Featuring a striking
tri-tone colour scheme, gold contrast-
cut rims, blue shock springs, a vibrant
red seat with integrated badging, and
bar-end mirrors, the Shotgun 650
seamlessly blended Royal Enfield’s
classic design DNA with ICON’s radical,
race-inspired aesthetics.
Engineered to embody individuality
and creative expression, the Shotgun
650 limited edition reflected a
design-first approach that pays
homage to the custom community’s
rebellious spirit. The collaboration
elevated the Shotgun’s dynamic form
into a collector’s piece, combining         TOPGEAR X CONTINENTAL GT                   Additionally, Royal Enfield’s 3X

       Royal Enfield also saw its first-ever
       collaboration between the EGF and
       Customs teams. The result: a striking,
       all-carbon Himalayan 450 crafted by
       Motoexotica in just 31 days. Unveiled at
       the inaugural Journeying Through the
       Himalayas festival, the build stood as a
       powerful expression of speed, grit, and
       team synergy.

       APAC BUILDS: FROM
       DRAGSTRIPS TO BAGGERS
       In Japan, custom house Sure Shot drew
       from drag racing culture to craft a
       Shotgun 650 with raw, aggressive lines.
       Meanwhile, in Taiwan, Rough Crafts took
       on another Shotgun – this one set to
       inspire an ICON-style limited edition
       drop in 2025.
       The Super Meteor 650 also saw bold
       reinterpretations across APAC. AMS
       Garage in Indonesia developed a sleek
       aluminium bagger, while Purpose Built
       Moto in Australia looked to the 1950s
       to create a nostalgic yet refined cruiser
       silhouette – both celebrating distinct
       design philosophies within Royal
       Enfield’s versatile canvas.

       EUROPE BUILDS: A TRACKER
       AND A RALLY FLEET
       In Europe, Royal Enfield continued its
       long-standing collaboration with Malle
       London by updating the Malle Rally GT
       Enduro fleet, turning heads both on
       the rally route and online. At Wheels
       & Waves, the Hedgehog Shotgun 650
       “Dark Shot” Street Tracker made its
       debut – one of the first complete
       Shotgun customs and a dramatic nod
       to stripped-down street culture.

EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




        TOGETHER,
        WE RIDE DEEPER




92     INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
                                           CORPORATE OVERVIEW




At the heart of Royal Enfield lies a
thriving community – riders bound
not just by machines, but by a deep-
rooted passion for the open road. Every
ride becomes a shared memory, every
route a reason to connect. Fuelled by
this spirit, Royal Enfield continues
to nurture these bonds through
purpose-driven rides and gatherings
that celebrate the collective joy of
exploration and the enduring culture of
motorcycling.

With an ever-evolving roster of curated
rides across the year, Royal Enfield
offers something for every kind of
rider: from high-altitude adventure
expeditions and long-haul explorations
to laid-back lifestyle trails and culture-
led weekend getaways. These aren’t
just rides – they’re access points to
bucket-list journeys, the kind that
are hard to plan or pull off solo. Each
experience is designed to bring riders
together, spark camaraderie, and
deepen their connection to the world
on two wheels, making the ride as
meaningful as the destination.




                        INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25   93
EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




Rides and Community-Led Celebrations

RIDING TOGETHER,
RISING AS ONE
Royal Enfield’s rides
are more than journeys;
they are expressions of a
deeply rooted passion for
motorcycling. United by
shared experiences and
a spirit of exploration,
riders come together to
celebrate the road, the
ride, and the resilient
community that grows
stronger with every mile.


HIMALAYAN ADVENTURE
TIBET
One of the most awaited rides of 2024,
the Himalayan Adventure Tibet brought
riders face-to-face with the ancient
and mystical landscapes of Tibet while
navigating rugged trails through Nepal.
Held from May 12 to 26 on the all-new
Himalayan, the expedition offered an
immersive journey steeped in spiritual
significance, natural grandeur, and
cultural depth.

Celebrating the global spirit of
motorcycling, Royal Enfield marked
World Motorcycle Day 2024 with
citywide rides across six Indian metros.
Held on June 22 and 23, the event

Pacific region saw 6,480 riders join

America, and North America, One

NORTH BENGAL RIDE 2024
SPOTLIGHTS THE BEAUTY OF
THE EASTERN HIMALAYAN
REGION
Held from April 26 to 29, the North
Bengal Ride 2024 delivered a scenic
and cultural deep dive into the hill towns
of Eastern India. The route began in
Siliguri and carved through Kurseong,
Darjeeling, Tinchuley, Lamahatta,
Lepchajagat, and Mirik before circling
back. Designed for riders seeking both
immersion and adventure, the ride
offered a blend of national highways
and winding mountain roads against the
backdrop of North Bengal’s lush valleys
and colonial-era charm.



96        INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
                      CORPORATE OVERVIEW




   open highways with heritage properties
   and off-road desert trails. With 18 Super
   Meteor 650s and full logistical support,
   the journey celebrated the spirit of
   exploration through sweeping roads,
   local culture, and immersive riding
   experiences.

   TOUR OF THE NORTHEAST
   2025
   Spanning 13 days from January 17 to
   30, the Tour of the Northeast 2025
   offered riders an expansive exploration
   of one of India’s most diverse and
   scenic regions. Starting in Guwahati, the
   ride traversed Cherrapunjee, Shillong,
   Dawki, Jowai, Kaziranga, Majuli, Ziro,
   Bhalukpong, Dirang, and Tawang.
   From the wildlife of Kaziranga and the
   spiritual calm of Tawang Monastery to
   the cascading beauty of the Garden of
   Caves, the journey immersed riders in
   Northeast India’s natural grandeur and
   layered cultural identity.

        JOURNEYING
        ACROSS THE
        HIMALAYAS



98     INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
                                          CORPORATE OVERVIEW




Journeying Across the Himalayas’
is a first-of-its-kind festival by
Royal Enfield’s Social Mission
that celebrates the cultural,
ecological, and creative spirit
of the Himalayas. Held in Delhi,
this 10-day gathering brought
together artists, communities,
changemakers, and experts through
immersive exhibitions, powerful
storytelling, live music, regional
cuisine, and thought-provoking
conversations. With over 200
collaborators across disciplines, the
festival sparked collective action
and deepened public connection
to this iconic region. It celebrated
heritage with a future-focussed
lens on sustainability, resilience,
and community.

EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




Operating Environment

RIDING THE FUTURE OF
MOBILITY IN A SHIFTING WORLD
The global automotive industry is navigating a critical juncture, shaped by energy
transition, changing consumer expectations, and the rise of smart, sustainable,
and purpose-driven mobility. In this evolving ecosystem, where performance,
premiumisation, and personalisation converge, EML continues to stay ahead by
leveraging its deep-rooted legacy, innovation-led mindset, and a sharp focus on
executing future-ready strategies.

With dynamic macroeconomic shifts, supply chain evolution, and growing
stakeholder focus on environmental responsibility, the Company remains agile
and adaptive in calibrating its responses. EML’s differentiated approach, blending
engineering excellence with brand-led emotional connect, positions it well to
respond to these structural changes and consumer shifts.




106    INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
                                                                                                     INTEGRATED REPORT




RESPONDING TO THE TRENDS SHAPING THE INDUSTRY

Evolving aspirations for premium, connected motorcycles

Industry Context:                                            EML strategic response:
There is a growing shift in the Indian and global            With a stronghold in the mid-weight motorcycle segment,
two-wheeler market towards mid-size, premium                 Royal Enfield continues to lead this shift through its
motorcycles that combine advanced technology with            differentiated products and brand experience. Backed by a
distinctive style. Today’s riders are seeking more than      wide community network, innovative launches such as Guerrilla
just mobility, they want purpose, personality, and           450, Shotgun 650 and Classic 650, and the growing “RE
performance, all wrapped into one ride.                      ecosystem”, the Company remains focussed on deepening its
                                                             connect with aspirational, experience-seeking customers.


Accelerated transition towards sustainable and electric mobility

Industry Context:                                            EML strategic response:
The push for greener mobility continues to gain              EML has been strengthening its EV strategy across both

Stakeholder Engagement

ENGAGING FOR SUSTAINABLE
GROWTH
Stakeholders remain central to EML’s sustained growth, strategic direction, and
long-term value creation. In line with its commitment to inclusive progress, EML
continues to engage proactively with its diverse stakeholder groups through
structured, transparent, and responsive communication. These engagements
are aligned with the Company’s purpose of shaping responsible mobility
solutions – fuelled by a strong legacy and wired for future-ready growth. By
identifying stakeholder expectations and addressing them through focussed
initiatives, EML ensures continued trust, collaboration, and shared progress.

Risk Management

NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
WITH CONFIDENCE
At Eicher Motors Limited (EML), a strong risk management framework forms the
foundation of sustainable growth. It facilitates early identification of potential
risks and the development of effective mitigation strategies. This proactive
approach enables the Company to stay resilient against emerging challenges
while protecting its strategic objectives and long-term value creation.


KEY RISKS AND MITIGATING ACTIONS

Financial Capital

STRENGTHENING
VALUE THROUGH
RECORD-
BREAKING
PERFORMANCE
FY 2024-25 was a landmark year for EML,
marked by the highest-ever revenue,
EBITDA and profit. The performance
reflects the strength of EML’s business
model, disciplined execution and
financial prudence. Amid evolving macro
conditions and input volatility, the
Company remained focussed on operating
efficiency, capital productivity, and long-
term value creation.

With zero net debt, robust cash flows and
a well-capitalised balance sheet, EML
continues to operate from a position of
financial strength. These fundamentals
enable the Company to pursue growth
opportunities confidently while
maintaining resilience.


SDG LINKAGE




Financial capital is based on standalone financial
statements of the Company
EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT AT EML
EML generated ` 3,829.94 Crores in cash from operations in FY 2024-25, maintaining strong internal accruals. As on March
31, 2025, net cash position stood at ` 16,089.90 Crores and net worth at ` 18,499.84 Crores. The Company’s healthy liquidity
provide adequate buffer to support capex, working capital and long-term investments across business verticals.

VALUE CREATION FOR SHAREHOLDERS
Over the last decade (FY 2013-25), EML has delivered a market capitalisation CAGR of ~21.1% and a ~17-fold increase in
dividends paid. In FY 2024-25 alone, dividends totalled ` 1,919.15 Crores – the highest-ever in the Company’s history. As of
March 31, 2025, market capitalisation stood at ` 1,46,614.73 Crores, while return on equity is at 25.0%.

The Company remains focussed on generating sustainable returns while allocating capital prudently across core and new
growth vectors.

Manufactured Capital

BUILDING SCALE,
PRECISION AND
GLOBAL
MANUFACTURING
EXCELLENCE
EML continues to strengthen
its reputation for delivering
premium, distinctive, and globally
competitive motorcycles. In
FY 2024-25, the Company advanced
its manufacturing capabilities by
investing in process innovation,
automation, quality systems,
and sustainable practices. These
efforts contributed to enhanced
scale, flexibility, and operational
efficiency-reinforcing its position
as a global benchmark in
mid-weight motorcycling.



SDGs IMPACTED
EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




MANUFACTURING
EXCELLENCE AND EXPERTISE
EML’s state-of-the-art manufacturing
infrastructure is built on globally
benchmarked practices, lean systems,
and highly skilled workforce capabilities.
With DNV-certified plants and the
widespread adoption of the SRK
methodology, the Company achieved
a 50% reduction in fault frequency
across models. Horizontal deployment
of quality frameworks across its CKD
(completely knocked down) operations
further bolstered consistency and
efficiency – while preserving Royal
Enfield’s hallmark 'Made Like a Gun'
quality and aesthetic.

Highlights of the current
manufacturing setup include:
Vehicle assembly
 Flexible assembly line with capacity
  1,990+ SKUs production
 90+ Poka Yoke systems; full vehicle
  testing through road/dynamometer
  systems.
Engine assembly
 100% sub-assembly tightening with
  DC nutrunners
 520 Poka Yoke interventions; semi-
  automated testing of all engines.
 Semi-automatic testing of 100%
  engines
Surface finishing
 46 robots for superior paint finish
  and better transfer efficiency
 Corrosion protection, weather
  resistance and sheen appearance
  measurement by gloss
 Currently painting 54 colours,
  capable of adding 15 more colour
Machining
 367 machining centres, 32 robotic
  washing, 19 robotic deburring
  machines for auto deburring
 Online SPCs with line interlocking to
  capture data of critical parameters

EXPANDING CKD CAPABILITIES FOR GLOBAL GROWTH
To cater to global demand more efficiently, EML has prioritised localisation through its CKD strategy. The CKD
facility in Nepal, commissioned in FY 2024-25, has an annual capacity of 20,000 units and caters to Nepal and
neighbouring SAARC markets.

FUTURE OF
INTELLIGENT,
SUSTAINABLE
AND CONNECTED
MOBILITY

motorcycling through a strong
foundation in research and
development. As a company deeply
rooted in a legacy of innovation and
engineering excellence, Eicher's
R&D function is not just a catalyst
for product evolution but also a
strategic pillar enabling customer-
centric, sustainable, and intelligent
mobility solutions. From launching
a dedicated electric vehicle (EV)
brand to investing in futuristic
simulation tools, advanced engine
systems, digital interfaces, and
sustainable technologies, Eicher’s
R&D team is transforming mobility
experiences and creating new
benchmarks across the two-
wheeler landscape.

       Machine Love Highlighted The
       Craft Of Service
       Royal Enfield’s Machine Love initiative
       celebrated the bond between rider,
       machine, and technician. Through
       every service touchpoint, the brand
       underscored precision, care, and the
       human connection that keeps each
       motorcycle running at its best –
       turning routine maintenance into an
       experience of passion and trust.

       Royal Enfield Entered The World
       Of Comics With A Sold-Out
       Launch
       The brand launched its first-ever comic
       book, developed in collaboration
       with renowned Marvel and DC artists.
       The limited-edition drop sold out at
       Motoverse and marked Royal Enfield’s
       foray into immersive storytelling. A
       publishing deal with HarperCollins
       India and upcoming retail distribution
       through Crossword added momentum
       to this creative expansion.

Social and Relationship Capital -
Communities


WHERE THE
ROAD MEETS
RESPONSIBILITY
FOR THE PEOPLE
AROUND
EML, through the Royal Enfield Social
Mission, continued to deepen its social
impact in FY 2024-25 with strategic
community partnerships, capacity-building
programmes and grassroots conservation
efforts across the Himalayan region
and other geographies of operation.
With climate resilience and community
empowerment at its core, the initiatives
touched lives, strengthened traditional
knowledge systems, enabled nature-
linked livelihoods, and nurtured the fragile
Himalayan ecosystem. This year, many
interventions matured from pilot to steady-
state programmes, laying the foundation for
deeper, long-term transformation.

SDGs IMPACTED




       OUR SOCIAL MISSION
       By 2030, 100 Himalayan communities
       and landscapes are resilient and
       thriving even in the face of climate
       change. Alongside, a movement of one
       Million riders is catalysed to explore
       sustainably and regenerate the
       landscapes they ride through.

                                                             INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25             153
EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




In FY 2024-25, the initiative evolved
into a multi-layered programme that
integrated rangeland conservation,
wool and pashmina value chain
strengthening, craft revival, market
linkages, and creative documentation.
Implemented across Ladakh, Himachal
Pradesh, Uttarakhand, Kashmir and
Assam, the Himalayan Knot supported
artisans, protected ecosystems, and
spotlighted Himalayan narratives
through culture and design.

Rangeland Conservation &
Livelihood Security
Partnering with NCF and BNHS, seven
winter corrals were built in Eastern
Ladakh (Khera Pullu, Kargyam Sato,
Sumdo), providing warm, predator-safe
shelter to over 8,900 livestock. This
protected herders’ livelihoods while
ensuring reduced snow leopard conflict.
                                           Assam: Aagor developed 15 new

                                            India Today NE, Jagran HiTech,
With its roots in the principle of “Ride    and others.
for Purpose,” TGHE enables deeper
engagements with local communities,
builds awareness around living
traditions, and supports responsible
tourism by promoting sensitivity toward
ecology, customs, and the region’s
fragile socio-cultural fabric.

TGHE Edition III: A Milestone Year
 In FY 2024-25, TGHE Edition
  III documented 26 unique ICH
  practices across both Eastern
  and Western Himalayas through
  56 rider-researchers. These
  expeditions deepened the reach of
  the programme into Ladakh and
  Sikkim, and enhanced its storytelling
  strength through collaborations with
  experts and media partners.
Western Himalayas: Ladakh Cultural
Mapping
TGHE’s Western Himalayan edition
was launched with a cultural briefing
at UNESCO House and Triveni Kala
Sangam, New Delhi, featuring experts
like Tim Curtis, Imtiaz Ali, and others.
This was followed by four curated
journeys across Ladakh that explored
16 ICH practices – from oral storytelling
and folk music to textile weaving and
nomadic rituals.
 42 rider-researchers participated
  across multiple routes.

BIODIVERSITY &
CONSERVATION
UN SDGs




Royal Enfield’s biodiversity initiatives
aim to foster long-term coexistence
between Himalayan communities
and critical species. In FY 2024-25,
the focus extended across high-
altitude, forest, riverine and marine
ecosystems, supporting conservation
science, awareness, human-wildlife
conflict mitigation, and nature-based
livelihoods.

Natural Capital

RIDING
SUSTAINABLE
OUTCOMES
THROUGH
RESOURCE
EFFICIENCY
Sustainability continues to
remain at the core of EML’s long-
term strategy and operations.
The Company’s efforts are
centred around minimising
environmental impact while
promoting resource efficiency,
clean energy adoption, and
stakeholder collaboration. From
reducing its carbon footprint
to achieving water positivity
and enabling circularity, EML is
advancing towards a planet-
positive future by engaging
employees, communities, and
the supply chain to amplify its
impact.

Water is a critical resource, and EML operates with a focus on reducing, recycling and reusing water to prevent stress on
local communities and ecosystems. With ongoing efforts to reduce freshwater consumption, EML has ensured water positive
operations for the sixth consecutive year.

172       INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
                                                              INTEGRATED REPORT




REDUCING AND MANAGING
WASTE
EML has significantly reduced solid
wastes generated across various
stages of operations by deploying
various measures. Paper usage
has been eliminated, helping save
trees and environmental impact.
The Company stringently follows the
practice of treating all hazardous
wastes before disposal.

Further, various initiatives have
been taken to effectively manage
wastes including converting sewage
sludge into vermicompost and
generating biogas from waste food
for use in cooking. Wastes like ETP/
phosphate/paint sludge, powder,
residue containing oil, and filter
waste are co-processed in cement
kilns. Plastic wastes are managed
as per statutory Extended Producer
Responsibility norms under PWM
Rules, 2016.

RECYCLING AND REUSING
WASTE
All EML units have zero liquid
discharge plants (STP and ETP) to
treat wastewater and reuse it for
irrigation and process top-ups.
These systems can further treat
and lower the chemical content
in effluents, enhancing water
recovery. EML also conducted
studies to increase the recyclability,
recoverability and reusability of
motorcycle parts. A 97% reusability
was achieved in FY 2024-25, with
ongoing efforts to achieve complete
usability and recoverability of parts.

EICHER MOTORS LIMITED

VISIONARIES AT THE HELM
  Mr. Siddhartha Lal                     Mr. Siddhartha Lal is the Executive Chairman of Eicher Motors Limited (EML) and also
  Executive Chairman                     serves as Non Executive Director on the Board of VE Commercial Vehicles Limited

                                                                   Eicher Motors Limited (EML) (Bloomberg- EIM: IN) is a leading
                                                                   Indian multinational automotive company, listed on the
                                                                   BSE and NSE, with diversified interests in motorcycles and
                                                                   commercial vehicles. EML owns Royal Enfield, the world’s
                                                                   oldest motorcycle brand in continuous production since 1901,
                                                                   and a pioneer in shaping the mid-size motorcycle segment
                                                                   in India. In addition to its motorcycle business, EML owns
                                                                   54.4% stake in VE Commercial Vehicles Limited (VECV), a joint
                                                                   venture with the Volvo Group of Sweden, a global leader in
                                                                   commercial vehicles.

                                                                   About Royal Enfield:
                                                                   Royal Enfield has a rich legacy of over a century, combining
                                                                   timeless design with modern engineering to deliver

REBALANCE - A STRATEGIC LONG-TERM VISION
Royal Enfield continues to stay firmly anchored to its purpose, mission and values through REBALANCE – a strategic framework
designed to enhance long-term business resilience. As the external environment evolves, REBALANCE reflects the Company’s
intent to recalibrate its mission and renew its commitment to building an agile, future-ready and enduring business. Rooted in the
philosophy of Pure Motorcycling, this approach seeks to bring harmony between the rider, the machine and the terrain.

The REBALANCE strategy is built on four core pillars:

        Pillar 1: Products -              Pillar 2: Brand                  Pillar 3: Growth                  Pillar 4:

PRODUCT - ICE & EV
New Launches

 2024 ROYAL ENFIELD GUERRILLA 450 - RISE OF THE ALL-NEW ROADSTER                                    Royal Enfield introduced the
                                                                                                    Guerrilla 450 in July 2024 – a
                                                                                                    spirited modern roadster
                                                                                                    built on the new Sherpa 450
                                                                                                    platform. Engineered for
                                                                                                    visceral responsiveness and
                                                                                                    dynamic road presence, the
                                                                                                    Guerrilla is a powerful and
                                                                                                    agile motorcycle tailored for
                                                                                                    urban agility and weekend
                                                                                                    exploration. The 452cc liquid-
                                                                                                    cooled DOHC engine delivers
                                                                                                    40 PS and 40 Nm, tuned
                                                                                                    for accessible power across
                                                                                                    the rev range, while a newly
                                                                                                    developed steel twin-spar
                                                                                                    chassis ensures responsive
                                                                                                    handling and stability.
                                                                                                    The Guerrilla 450 further
                                                                                                    reinforces Royal Enfield’s
                                                                                                    strength in the roadster
                                                                                                    segment. Since its launch, the
                                                                                                    Guerrilla has received strong
                                                                                                    traction among younger riders
                                                                                                    across India and Europe.




                                                                                 INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25            185
EICHER MOTORS LIMITED




 CLASSIC 350 - THE EVERGREEN LEGACY                   Continuing its legacy as one
                                                      of Royal Enfield’s most iconic
                                                      motorcycles, the Classic 350
                                                      was relaunched in August
                                                      2024 in a refreshed avatar.
                                                      With upgraded features
                                                      including LED headlamps,
                                                      USB-C charging port
                                                      and Tripper Navigation,
                                                      the Classic stays true to
                                                      its timeless design while
                                                      embracing subtle modern
                                                      enhancements. Seven new
                                                      colourways across five distinct
                                                      variants further enhance its
                                                      appeal. Royal Enfield also
                                                      launched the Factory Custom
                                                      Programme, offering first-
                                                      time personalisation services
                                                      to Classic 350 customers
                                                      – a significant step towards
                                                      bespoke motorcycling. The
                                                      updated Classic continues
                                                      to remain a strong volume
                                                      driver across domestic and
                                                      international markets.



 GOAN CLASSIC 350 - FREE-SPIRITED. BOBBER-INSPIRED.   Launched at Motoverse 2024
                                                      in Goa, the Goan Classic 350
                                                      is Royal Enfield’s tribute to
                                                      the custom counterculture of
                                                      the 70s and 80s. A bobber-
                                                      inspired derivative of the
                                                      Classic platform, the Goan
                                                      Classic delivers laid-back
                                                      ergonomics, a single floating
                                                      seat, chopped fenders
                                                      and retro whitewall tyres.
                                                      Equipped with the same
                                                      refined 349cc engine as the
                                                      Classic, the Goan Classic
                                                      offers smooth power delivery
                                                      with a bohemian twist. With
                                                      four colourways, modern
                                                      touches like LED lighting, and
                                                      a strong connection to Goan
                                                      heritage, the Goan Classic
                                                      broadens Royal Enfield’s
                                                      lifestyle motorcycle portfolio
                                                      and has resonated well with
                                                      riders seeking individuality and
                                                      aesthetic expression.




186    INTEGRATED ANNUAL REPORT 2024-25
                                                                       STATUTORY REPORTS




BEAR 650 - SCRAMBLER WITH SOUL                                   Inspired by the legendary Big
                                                                 Bear Run and its youngest
                                                                 champion, Eddie Mulder, the
                                                                 Bear 650 was introduced in
                                                                 November 2024 as a rugged,
                                                                 soul-stirring scrambler.
                                                                 Based on the award-winning
                                                                 650cc platform, the Bear 650
                                                                 features a revised chassis,
                                                                 2-1 exhaust system, dual-
                                                                 purpose tyres and 184 mm
                                                                 of ground clearance. The
                                                                 motorcycle is engineered to
                                                                 offer an authentic scrambler
                                                                 experience, both in design and
                                                                 performance. Equipped with
                                                                 modern elements such as LED
                                                                 lighting, Tripper Dash and the
                                                                 Wingman Connectivity Suite,
                                                                 the Bear 650 blends vintage
                                                                 aesthetics with modern-day
                                                                 usability. The model has been
                                                                 well received globally for its
                                                                 unique blend of heritage and
                                                                 performance.




SCRAM 440 - BORN FROM ADVENTURE, TUNED FOR PLAY                  In January 2025, Royal Enfield
                                                                 launched the Scram 440 – a
                                                                 versatile ADV crossover that
                                                                 bridges urban commuting with
                                                                 all-terrain play. Built on the
                                                                 new LS 440 engine platform,
                                                                 the Scram 440 features a
                                                                 443cc long-stroke engine,
                                                                 6-speed gearbox, switchable
                                                                 ABS and dual-purpose tyres.
                                                                 With upright ergonomics, LED
                                                                 lighting and a low seat height
                                                                 of 795 mm, the motorcycle
                                                                 offers enhanced accessibility
                                                                 and fun for both new and
                                                                 seasoned riders. The Scram
                                                                 440 is positioned as an
                                                                 everyday motorcycle with
                                                                 serious weekend capabilities.
                                                                 The model has attracted
                                                                 interest from adventure-
                                                                 seekers looking for a nimble
                                                                 yet capable machine in the
                                                                 entry-level ADV space.

 CLASSIC 650 - DOUBLE THE CHARACTER, DOUBLE THE CHARM                                             At EICMA 2024, Royal Enfield
                                                                                                  launched the much-loved
                                                                                                  and eagerly anticipated
                                                                                                  Royal Enfield Classic 650.
                                                                                                  The magnum opus in Royal
                                                                                                  Enfield’s stable, the new Classic
                                                                                                  650 is a super-sized version
                                                                                                  of the iconic silhouette of
                                                                                                  Classics from the past and
                                                                                                  stays true to the genetic
